mnemonics.title: Pointer vs Reference Differences
mnemonics.content: PRANC - Pointers can be Reassigned and Null; References are Aliases that are Non-reassignable and Cannot be null

mnemonics.title: Const Pointer Declarations
mnemonics.content: Read from right to left: 'const int * ptr' - pointer to constant integer; 'int * const ptr' - constant pointer to integer; 'const int * const ptr' - constant pointer to constant integer
